text:
There once was a beautiful little rabbit that lived in a lush meadow. Every day she would go chasing after butterfly nests. She had lots of friends who loved to go chinking amongst the daisies. One day it rained frogs. She couldn't believe it. It was like heaven. Every frog would sing "Down Along the Creek. They'd have tea parties and sing "Mary Had a Little Goat."

She missed you. Remember my necklace? Can’t remember who took it? Let’s never speak of it again. How about a little rabbit parade? You march first!

The End.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
